message:
test(bubbletea): Add comprehensive modifier key tests for arrow keys

Expands test coverage for keyboard escape sequence parsing:

- Ctrl+Right/Left arrow keys (modifier 5): "\x1b[1;5C", "\x1b[1;5D"
- Ctrl+Alt+Arrow keys (modifier 7): All four directions
- Ctrl+Shift+Alt+Arrow keys (modifier 8): All four directions

Tests verify both key type recognition and modifier flag propagation,
ensuring the alt flag is properly set on combined modifier sequences.
These keyboard shortcuts are commonly used in terminal editors and
navigation, so proper handling improves TUI application compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
